title: pelargonium amicum
intro: Pelargonium amicum, also known as the "Friendly Geranium," is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium amicum include its high concentration of geraniol and linalool, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, fever, and other health problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium amicum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and anxiety.
